message:
feat(python): enable algorithm dispatch for MultiGraph/MultiDiGraph

Extend extract_graph() to accept PyMultiGraph and PyMultiDiGraph,
converting them to simple Graph/DiGraph for algorithm dispatch.
This enables all 278+ algorithm functions to work on multigraphs.

- Add MultiUndirected/MultiDirected variants to GraphRef enum
- Add digraph() helper for directed-specific algorithm dispatch
- Add multigraph_to_simple_graph() and multidigraph_to_simple_digraph()
- Fix 36 unreachable!() panics that would fire on MultiDirected inputs
- Update readwrite.rs match expressions for multigraph support

br-8k4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
